examples: This money is my only income
The stone wall was the backdrop for the performance
The children made up the chorus
This sum represents my entire income for a year
These few men comprise his entire army
This designer makes up our Spring collections

meanings.definition: do or give something to somebody in return
examples: Does she pay you for the work you are doing?

meanings.definition: make up work that was missed due to absence at a later point
examples: I have to make up a French exam
Can I catch up with the material or is it too late?

meanings.definition: make up something artificial or untrue

examples: engineers will work to correct the effects or air resistance
After some discussion we finally made up

meanings.definition: apply make-up or cosmetics to one's face to appear prettier
examples: She makes herself up every morning
